-fno-strict-aliasing -pipe "  LDFLAGS="" prefix="/usr/local" 
LOCALEDIR="/usr/local/share/locale"  DI_BUILD_NO_NLS=0  ./Build 
config.h) features/cflags.sh:1: command not found: sed eval: 1: Syntax
